title: 50 Billion Dollar Bet on Anthropic: AMD Not Only Sells Chips but Also Becomes a Shareholder of an AI Lab
excerpt: A deal that binds "shovel sellers" and "gold diggers" into a community of shared destiny has taken shape in the AI computing power market. On July 22 (Wednesday
content_html:
A deal that binds "shovel sellers" and "gold diggers" into a community of shared destiny has taken shape in the AI computing power market. On July 22 (Wednesday), AMD announced a strategic partnership with Anthropic and unveiled a plan: to invest up to $5 billion in this artificial intelligence company in the future. This is no longer a simple supplier-customer relationship, but rather a chip giant directly placing both capital and production capacity on a top-tier model laboratory.

The other hand of the collaboration is tangible computing power supply. According to the agreement, Anthropic will adopt AMD's Helios rack-level solution, deploying a total scale of 2 gigawatts of AMD Instinct MI450 series GPUs. Notably, the gigawatt (GW) has quietly become a new standard unit for measuring the scale of AI data centers - when computing power demand reaches such a level, the benchmark discussed has jumped from a single server to the power supply capacity of an entire power plant. The first 1 gigawatt of computing power will be deployed by mid-2025, which means that Anthropic's underlying computing power supply will officially move away from reliance on a single vendor and welcome a new branch from AMD.

For AMD, securing Anthropic is both an order and an endorsement: the MI450 series, as the core of the Helios rack solution, directly enters the training and inference scenarios of top AI laboratories; for Anthropic, adding AMD as a high-performance computing source, in addition to Google's TPU and Samsung, provides an additional layer of assurance for supply chain diversification and bargaining power. When a chip company is willing to invest up to $5 billion to support its customer, the power structure of the computing power market is being rewritten.

sentences.en: A deal that binds "shovel sellers" and "gold diggers" into a community of shared destiny has taken shape in the AI computing power market.
sentences.zh: AI算力市场上，一场将“铲子卖家”和“淘金者”捆绑成命运共同体的交易已经形成。

sentences.en: On July 22 (Wednesday), AMD announced a strategic partnership with Anthropic and unveiled a plan: to invest up to $5 billion in this artificial intelligence company in the future.
sentences.zh: 7月22日（周三），AMD宣布与Anthropic达成战略合作伙伴关系，并公布了一项计划：未来向这家人工智能公司投资最多50亿美元。

sentences.en: This is no longer a simple supplier-customer relationship, but rather a chip giant directly placing both capital and production capacity on a top-tier model laboratory.
sentences.zh: 这不再是简单的供应商与客户的关系，而是芯片巨头直接将资金和产能都放在了顶级的样板实验室上。

blocks.html_en: The other hand of the collaboration is tangible computing power supply. According to the agreement, Anthropic will adopt AMD's Helios rack-level solution, deploying a total scale of 2 gigawatts of AMD Instinct MI450 series GPUs. Notably, the gigawatt (GW) has quietly become a new standard unit for measuring the scale of AI data centers - when computing power demand reaches such a level, the benchmark discussed has jumped from a single server to the power supply capacity of an entire power plant. The first 1 gigawatt of computing power will be deployed by mid-2025, which means that Anthropic's underlying computing power supply will officially move away from reliance on a single vendor and welcome a new branch from AMD.

sentences.en: The other hand of the collaboration is tangible computing power supply.
sentences.zh: 合作的另一方面是有形的算力供应。

sentences.en: According to the agreement, Anthropic will adopt AMD's Helios rack-level solution, deploying a total scale of 2 gigawatts of AMD Instinct MI450 series GPUs.
sentences.zh: 根据协议，Anthropic将采用AMD的Helios机架级解决方案，部署总规模为2GW的AMD Instinct MI450系列GPU。

sentences.en: Notably, the gigawatt (GW) has quietly become a new standard unit for measuring the scale of AI data centers - when computing power demand reaches such a level, the benchmark discussed has jumped from a single server to the power supply capacity of an entire power plant.
sentences.zh: 值得注意的是，吉瓦（GW）已经悄然成为衡量AI数据中心规模的新标准单位——当算力需求达到这样的水平时，讨论的基准已经从单个服务器跃升至整个发电厂的供电能力。

sentences.en: The first 1 gigawatt of computing power will be deployed by mid-2025, which means that Anthropic's underlying computing power supply will officially move away from reliance on a single vendor and welcome a new branch from AMD.
sentences.zh: 首批1吉瓦算力将于2025年中期部署，这意味着Anthropic的底层算力供应将正式摆脱对单一供应商的依赖，迎来AMD的新分支。

blocks.html_en: For AMD, securing Anthropic is both an order and an endorsement: the MI450 series, as the core of the Helios rack solution, directly enters the training and inference scenarios of top AI laboratories; for Anthropic, adding AMD as a high-performance computing source, in addition to Google's TPU and Samsung, provides an additional layer of assurance for supply chain diversification and bargaining power. When a chip company is willing to invest up to $5 billion to support its customer, the power structure of the computing power market is being rewritten.

sentences.en: For AMD, securing Anthropic is both an order and an endorsement: the MI450 series, as the core of the Helios rack solution, directly enters the training and inference scenarios of top AI laboratories; for Anthropic, adding AMD as a high-performance computing source, in addition to Google's TPU and Samsung, provides an additional layer of assurance for supply chain diversification and bargaining power.
sentences.zh: 对于AMD来说，获得Anthropic既是订单，也是背书：MI450系列作为Helios机架解决方案的核心，直接进入顶级AI实验室的训练和推理场景；对于Anthropic来说，除了谷歌的TPU和三星之外，添加AMD作为高性能计算来源，为供应链多元化和议价能力提供了额外的一层保证。

sentences.en: When a chip company is willing to invest up to $5 billion to support its customer, the power structure of the computing power market is being rewritten.
sentences.zh: 当一家芯片公司愿意投入高达50亿美元来支持其客户时，算力市场的权力结构正在被改写。

content_html_zh:
AI算力市场上，一场将“铲子卖家”和“淘金者”捆绑成命运共同体的交易已经形成。 7月22日（周三），AMD宣布与Anthropic达成战略合作伙伴关系，并公布了一项计划：未来向这家人工智能公司投资最多50亿美元。 这不再是简单的供应商与客户的关系，而是芯片巨头直接将资金和产能都放在了顶级的样板实验室上。

合作的另一方面是有形的算力供应。 根据协议，Anthropic将采用AMD的Helios机架级解决方案，部署总规模为2GW的AMD Instinct MI450系列GPU。 值得注意的是，吉瓦（GW）已经悄然成为衡量AI数据中心规模的新标准单位——当算力需求达到这样的水平时，讨论的基准已经从单个服务器跃升至整个发电厂的供电能力。 首批1吉瓦算力将于2025年中期部署，这意味着Anthropic的底层算力供应将正式摆脱对单一供应商的依赖，迎来AMD的新分支。

对于AMD来说，获得Anthropic既是订单，也是背书：MI450系列作为Helios机架解决方案的核心，直接进入顶级AI实验室的训练和推理场景；对于Anthropic来说，除了谷歌的TPU和三星之外，添加AMD作为高性能计算来源，为供应链多元化和议价能力提供了额外的一层保证。 当一家芯片公司愿意投入高达50亿美元来支持其客户时，算力市场的权力结构正在被改写。
